text:
IAT Networks – Company Documentation
A. Company Overview
IAT Networks is a Vellore-based consulting and outsourcing firm founded in February 2025 by
Ishwarya S. The company positions itself as a “Best Consulting services in Vellore,
Tamilnadu” provider, offering global BPO (Business Process Outsourcing), IT services, digital
marketing, and workforce/staffing solutions. Its mission is “to empower businesses with smart,
scalable, and reliable technology solutions”. IAT Networks emphasizes a quality-driven, transparent
process focused on client satisfaction and professionalism. In summary:
 Founded: 2025 (Founder: Ishwarya S).
 Headquarters: Vellore, Tamil Nadu (Katpadi – PIN 632007).
 Core Offerings: BPO & customer support; Digital marketing; Recruitment and staffing
(permanent hiring and RPO); Manpower supply; IT & software solutions. It describes itself as
delivering “reliable and efficient recruitment solutions” and “comprehensive BPO solutions”
tailored to business needs.
 Approach: Quality-driven and cost-effective, with an emphasis on integrity, professionalism,
and customized client relationships.
Overall, IAT Networks is a small but growing IT and business services company that links
organizations with talent and technology, serving clients across industries with end-to-end support
solutions.
B. Website Content Inventory
The public website contains the following main pages and sections:
 Home (https://iatnetworks.com/): Company introduction and overview. Key sections
include a banner/tagline (“Best Consulting services in Vellore”), a brief company description
(“comprehensive BPO solutions, I.T services and workforce solutions globally”), Why
Us highlights, and summaries of core services (BPO, Digital Marketing, Recruitment). Also
features client logos and contact prompts (email, phone).
 About Us (https://iatnetworks.com/about-2-consulting-service-vellore/): Company story
and leadership profile. Includes founder’s background (Ishwarya S, education, career goals),
the company’s mission (“empower businesses with smart, scalable, reliable technology
solutions”) and vision (“become a globally trusted partner in IT services and workforce
solutions”).
 Services (https://iatnetworks.com/services-consultancy/): Detailed list of offered services.
Divided into categories: BPO services (customer support, call center, technical support, back-
office operations, HR/payroll, finance/accounting, email/chat); Digital Marketing (SEO, social
media, email marketing, Google Ads, lead gen, etc.); Manpower
Supply (temporary/permanent staffing, HR consulting, sector-specific staffing); IT
Services (hardware/software solutions, custom development, infrastructure management,
DevOps/cloud, ServiceNow).
 Contact (https://iatnetworks.com/contact-2/): Company contact details. Lists the
main phone (+91 73588 34638) and email (hr@iatnetworks.com), office location (“Katpadi,

Vellore, Tamilnadu – 632007”) and business hours (Mon–Sat 9am–5pm). Includes a web form
(for messages or CV submissions) and a prompt to “Send us your resume”.
 Privacy Policy (https://iatnetworks.com/privacy-policy-2/): Standard site privacy/legal
page. It lists contact info (same email) and template text about data collection and cookies. It
confirms that the site address is iatnetworks.com and that user contact data (name, phone,
email) may be collected.
Each page contains primarily static informational text; no blog or news section, FAQs, or pricing
details were found.
C. Services / Offerings
IAT Networks’s service catalog (as presented on the site) includes:
 BPO & Customer Support: Comprehensive back-office outsourcing (data entry, admin tasks),
call center and technical support. These services aim to reduce client costs and improve
efficiency. The site highlights managing “back-office processes, customer support, and
administrative tasks” with precision. Key components include customer service, call center
operations, IT helpdesk, payroll/HR support and finance/accounting support.
 Digital Marketing: End-to-end online marketing solutions to grow client brands. Includes
SEO, social media marketing, email campaigns, Google Ads, and lead generation. IAT
Networks claims to combine creativity and analytics to reach audiences effectively.
 Recruitment & Staffing: Hiring solutions to connect businesses with talent.
Covers Permanent Staffing (direct full-time hires) and Recruitment Process Outsourcing
(RPO). The company provides “efficient recruitment solutions” and helps clients find skilled
professionals quickly. Sub-services include project-based deployment and HR management
support (e.g. staffing for healthcare or banking sectors).
 Manpower Supply / Contract Staffing: Supplying temporary or contract workers across
industries. Lists temporary & permanent staffing, project deployment, healthcare/medical
support, banking & financial services staffing, etc.. This overlaps with the
staffing/recruitment offerings.
 IT & Software Services: Technology solutions including hardware/software installations,
custom software development, infrastructure and network management, DevOps and cloud
infrastructure, and ServiceNow solutions. These offerings are framed as part of IAT’s mission
to deliver scalable tech solutions.
Each service area is briefly described on the site. The focus is on integrated, cost-effective solutions
rather than granular product details or pricing. No specific industries or verticals are singled out in
these descriptions, though the homepage mentions serving businesses “across industries”.
D. Business Capabilities
The website emphasizes several core attributes and capabilities:
 Trusted, Experienced Team: Phrases like “Experienced & Trusted” and “Trained
Professionals” are prominent. The founder’s profile highlights a tech background and
entrepreneurial focus.

 Quality-Driven, Professional: IAT Networks stresses a “quality-driven and transparent
process” with “highest standards of integrity and professionalism” in client relationships. It
markets itself as a reliable, client-centric partner (“focus on your success”, “we listen to your
feedback”).
 Cost-Effective: “Cost Effective” service is explicitly listed as a selling point, indicating
competitive pricing or efficiency.
 Strategic & Collaborative: The site calls out “Strategic Planning”, “Team Collaboration” and
“Expert Consultation” among its strengths. This suggests an approach that combines
technical expertise with business strategy.
 Scalability & Innovation: The mission/vision emphasize scalable, smart technology
solutions and innovation/agility. IAT positions itself as a forward-looking partner that helps
businesses adapt and grow.
 Global Reach (ambition): Although based in Vellore, the company language frequently uses
terms like “globally” and “international”, implying a goal to serve clients beyond the local
region.
These capabilities are reinforced through the company’s stated values and service commitments on
the site.
E. Contact / Support Details
 Email: hr@iatnetworks.com (also used for general inquiries and resume submissions).
 Phone: +91 73588 34638.
 Address: Katpadi, Vellore, Tamil Nadu 632007, India. (No street number given.)
 Office Hours: Monday–Saturday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM.
 Contact Form: A web form is available on the Contact page (though the demo shows
submission errors). The site encourages users to “send us your resume” to the above email.
 Other: No dedicated support line or FAQs were found. The Privacy Policy provides the same
HR contact for data or privacy inquiries.
F. Important Pages Found
 Home (Home page, https://iatnetworks.com/): Introduction and summary of IAT Networks.
Main purpose is marketing and brief overview. Key content: a banner with the tagline “Best
Consulting services in Vellore, Tamilnadu”; a welcome blurb about global BPO, IT and
workforce solutions; Why Us highlights listing qualities (Experienced & Trusted, Cost
Effective, etc.); summarized service offerings (BPO & Customer Support, Digital Marketing,
Recruitment); and client logos with a “Stay In Touch” section including contact email and
phone. The Home page also briefly defines Permanent Staffing and RPO.
Relevance: Serves as the main promotional landing page. It outlines the company’s scope
and value proposition, and provides quick links to services and contact. (No pricing or
technical details here.)
 About Us (https://iatnetworks.com/about-2-consulting-service-vellore/): Company
background and leadership. Main purpose is to give context on the company’s origin and

goals. Key content: Our Story – “Founded in February 2025 by Ishwarya S… global enterprise
offering IT, BPO and resource outsourcing services”; founder’s bio/education (shows the
CEO’s tech background); Our Mission – “empower businesses with smart, scalable, and
reliable technology solutions…”; Our Vision – “to become a globally trusted partner in IT
services and workforce solutions…”.
Relevance: Provides authenticity and vision. Confirms founding date, leadership, and high-
level strategy. Useful for company profile and RAG knowledge. (No additional services details
here beyond mission/vision.)
 Services (https://iatnetworks.com/services-consultancy/): Detailed service offerings. Main
purpose is to list what services are available. Key content: Definitions of service categories. It
explains BPO services (outsourcing customer support, data entry, tech support, etc.) and lists
associated services (customer service, call center, back office, HR/payroll, finance support,
email/chat support). It describes Digital Marketing (online promotion, SEO, social media,
etc.) and lists its components (website, social media, ads, lead gen, etc.). It also
lists Manpower Supply services (temporary/permanent staffing, HR consulting, sector-
specific staffing), and IT Services (hardware/software, custom development, infrastructure,
DevOps, ServiceNow).
Relevance: Core reference for what IAT Networks claims to offer. This page breaks down the
service categories in bullet-list form, making it a key source for understanding the company’s
capabilities.
 Contact (https://iatnetworks.com/contact-2/): Contact and location info. Main purpose is to
allow potential clients or candidates to reach out. Key content: Phone number
(+91 73588 34638) and hours (Mon–Sat, 9–5); location (Katpadi, Vellore, Tamilnadu 632007);
and email (hr@iatnetworks.com). Includes a contact form (currently showing validation
errors) and a link to privacy policy.
Relevance: Official contact details for support or inquiries. Critical for client outreach or lead
capture.
 Privacy Policy (https://iatnetworks.com/privacy-policy-2/): Data/privacy/legal page. Main
purpose is to inform users about data use. Key content: confirms website address, data
collected (name, phone, email) and contact email for data (hr@iatnetworks.com). Standard
privacy statements about cookies, comments, user rights.
Relevance: Necessary for compliance, but contains little business information. Confirms HR
email again. (No “Terms of Service” or other legal pages were found.)
G. Missing Information / Gaps
Despite the site’s content, several common elements are missing or not detailed:
 Pricing / Packages: No information on service pricing, packages, or quotes. Users must
contact the company for pricing.
 Industry Focus or Case Studies: While logos are shown, there’s no page listing industries
served, case studies, or client testimonials.
 Careers / Hiring Details: Aside from a generic “send us your resume” prompt, there is no
dedicated careers page or listing of open jobs or hiring processes.
 FAQs / Help: No FAQ section or help articles. Common customer questions (e.g. onboarding,
support hours, guarantees) are not addressed except basic hours on Contact page.

 Blog / News: No blog, news releases, or insights page to show thought leadership or
updates.
 Terms & Conditions: No terms of service or agreement document accessible (other than
Privacy Policy).
 Data Completeness: The About page lacks current financials, number of employees, or
detailed company history (only founding information).
These gaps suggest areas where the company might supplement information (e.g. by adding FAQs,
case studies, or pricing guides).
H. Cleaned Structured Notes
 Company: IAT Networks – consulting/outsourcing firm (est. 2025) based in Vellore, Tamil
Nadu.
 Founder: Ishwarya S (tech entrepreneur, Master’s in CS).
 Mission/Vision: Empower businesses with smart, scalable tech solutions; be a trusted global
IT and workforce partner.
 Tagline: “Best Consulting services in Vellore, Tamilnadu”, emphasizing cost-effective, reliable
service.
 Services Offered:
 BPO & Customer Support: Outsourced customer service, helpdesk, data entry, etc..
 Digital Marketing: SEO, social media, email/Google ads, lead generation.
 Recruitment/Staffing: Permanent hires and RPO; HR payroll support.
 Manpower Supply: Temp/permanent staffing, sector staffing (health, finance).
 IT Services: Hardware/software setup, custom development, infrastructure,
DevOps/cloud.
 Key Selling Points: Experienced/trained staff; emphasis on quality, transparency and client
satisfaction; collaborative strategic planning; cost-effective solutions.
 Clients: Unnamed businesses “across industries” (logos shown).
 Contact Info:
 Phone: +91 73588 34638.
 Email: hr@iatnetworks.com (for support & hiring).
 Location: Katpadi, Vellore 632007, Tamil Nadu.
 Hours: Mon–Sat 9am–5pm.
 Other: Privacy policy linked (legal boilerplate). Social media links not found on site (except
LinkedIn icon for founder). No pricing or FAQ.
